The '''Gorms''' were a [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Gormdin]]. Though they survived by hunting, they were known to be a peaceful race. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] legalized hunting Gorms for sport. When the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] came to power, Gorm hunting was made illegal.

==Biology and appearance==
Gorms were [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Reptile/Legends|reptilians]], standing an average of 1.5 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall. They were [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] bipeds in form, possessing two arms and two legs, with [[Lizard/Legends|lizard]]-like heads possessing large [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and long, sharp [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]]. Both sets of [[Limb/Legends|limbs]] ended in [[Claw/Legends|claws]], and their [[Leather/Legends|leathery]] skin was colored tan to light-brown. They subsisted by hunting.<ref name="WBC" />

==Society and culture==
The Gorms inhabited the small [[forest]]ed areas of the plateaus of [[Gormdin]], one of eight [[Moon/Legends|moons]] orbiting [[Sarrelon IV]]. Their culture was tribal, with independent communities spread around the planet. Their interactions with fellow Gorms and other sentient beings were largely peaceful, and Gorm tribes demonstrated the ability to easily come to agreement with each other with little violence.<ref name="WBC" />

==History==
The [[Sarrelon system/Legends|Sarrelon system]] was located in the [[Brevost sector/Legends|Brevost sector]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="TEAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref>
Gormdin was settled by [[Human/Legends|Humans]] prior to [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]<ref name="WBC" /><ref name="WBC date">[[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] notes on Page 4 of [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']] that he is writing three years after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which occurred in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> While the Gorms interacted peacefully with the settlers, not all of the settlers returned the favor; some of the more uncivilized settlements turned to hunting the Gorms for sport, and hats and other garments could be found for sale in shops there.<ref name="WBC" />

Also prior to 7 ABY, the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] and [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] [[Lohn Genden]] established his base of operations in a network of caves beneath one of Gormdin's plateaus. The Gorms expressed no interest in what occurred there, and instead kept their distance from it.<ref name="WBC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Gorms have so far only been mentioned in [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], a supplement for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' published in [[1993]] by [[West End Games]].
